title: Design document intelligence (OCR + LLM extraction) + DSA review
focus: Hybrid OCR + vision-LM extraction; confidence scoring; HITL review.

items.label: Design document intelligence (OCR + LLM extraction)
interviewQuestions: Walk me through designing a system that ingests invoices/contracts and extracts structured fields.
How would you handle hand-written or low-quality scans?

items.label: Eval & confidence scoring
interviewQuestions: How would you flag low-confidence extractions for human review?
